name: CodeGraph CLI
description: Installs the CodeGraph CLI (@colbymchenry/codegraph) — a pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, OpenCode, Antigravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent.

version.description: Version of @colbymchenry/codegraph to install (npm dist-tag or semver, e.g. 'latest', '1.0.0').

installNode.description: Install Node.js (via NodeSource) if 'node' is not already on PATH. Disable if you supply Node yourself.

nodeVersion.description: Major Node.js version to install when installNode is true (e.g. '18', '20', '22').

installCgiAlias.description: Install a shell alias 'cgi' => 'codegraph init -i' system-wide (bash + zsh) for quickly initializing the index in a project.
